Table.name: INSTRMNT
Table.commentInRDBMS: An Instrument is a product that establishes a financial relationship between a bank and its customer. In the context of accounting such a financial relationship may be considered a financial asset or a financial liabilty or an off-balance sheet item.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: INSTRMNT_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: INSTRMNT_ID
Column.comment: An identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.

Column.name: BLNC_SHT_NTTNG_ID
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each a balance sheet netting.

Column.name: INSTRMNT_TYP_PRDCT
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish instruments by product. Examples are loans and advances, securities financing transactions, financial guarantees and other commitments or over the counter derivatives.

Column.name: INSTRMNT_TYP_ORGN
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish instrument by their type of origin. For example instruments arising from financial contracts or instruments arising from credit facilities.

Column.name: SGNFCNT_ASST_CLSS
Column.comment: Classification into specific asset classes, like interest rate, equity, foreign exchange.

Column.name: NTNL_AMNT
Column.comment: The notional amount on a financial instrument is the nominal or face amount that is used to calculate payments made on that instrument.

Column.name: TYP_RSK
Column.comment: Type of financial risk Indicates the type of risk arising from exposures or transactions (e.g. credit risk or market risk) for Over the counter (OTC) Derivative instrument.

Column.name: CRRNCY1
Column.comment: The currency code according to ISO4217.

Column.name: OTC_DRVTV_INSTRMNT_TYP
Column.comment: The over the counter derivative role.

Column.name: DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTY4
Column.comment: The contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.

Column.name: OTC_OPTN_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between different types of over the counter options.

Column.name: OTC_SWP_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between different types of over the counter swaps.

Column.name: LN_AND_ADVNC_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between loans and advances.

Column.name: LTGTN_STTS
Column.comment:
Litigation indicates the status of the litigation that the exposure is in.
Finrep Annex V, Part 2.321, 322: An exposure shall be ‘in pre-litigation status’ where the debtor has been formally notified that the institution will take legal action against the debtor within a defined time period, unless certain contractual or other payment obligations are met. That shall also include cases where the contract has been terminated by the reporting institution because the debtor is in formal breach of the terms and conditions of the contract and the debtor has been notified accordingly, but no legal action against the debtor has formally been taken by the institution yet. Exposures classified as ‘in pre-litigation status’ can exit this classification if the outstanding amounts are paid or if they enter into litigation status as defined in the following paragraph. An exposure shall be ‘in litigation status’ where legal action against the debtor has formally been taken. This comprises cases where a court of law confirmed that formal judiciary proceedings have occurred or the judiciary system has been notified of the intention to commence legal proceedings.

Column.name: ELGBL_CNTRL_BNK_FNDNG_INDCTR1
Column.comment: Specifies if an object is eligible for central bank funding in the sense that it might be exchanged / provided as collateral for funding.

Column.name: DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTY3
Column.comment: The contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.

Column.name: LN_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between different types of loans. Examples are financial leases, trade receivables, deposits.

Column.name: SNDCTN_SB_PRTCPTN_MMBR_INSTRMNT_INDCTR
Column.comment: Syndication or sub-participation member instrument indicator distinguishes Instrument between those that are a member of a syndicated loan or a sub-participation, and those that are not.

Column.name: NMNL_AMNT1
Column.comment: Holding amount at nominal value

Column.name: CRRNCY
Column.comment: The currency code according to ISO4217.

Column.name: RPYMNT_RGHTS
Column.comment: Repayment rights, e.g. redeemable at notice.

Column.name: HQLA_INDCTR
Column.comment: An indicator specifying if an asset or collateral received is considered extremely high liquidity and credit quality (HQLA) eligible according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex 17 (Asset encumbrance), part 2, 2.1.2, column 035.

Column.name: DPST_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish the overnight and other deposit according to Regulation (EU) 1071/2013, Annex 2, Part 2 Definitions of instrument categories and Regulation (EU) 549/2013, 5.85.

Column.name: OTHR_DPST_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between deposits redeemable at notice and deposits with agreed maturity.

Column.name: MNMM_RSRV_INDCTR
Column.comment: Minimum reserve indicator indicates whether the Deposit redeemable at notice is a loan on demand needed for minimum reserve purposes set by the regulatory authorities or not.

Column.name: MNMM_RSRV_AMNT
Column.comment:
Minimum reserve iamount is the amount, expressed in the currency of the Loan on demand, that is put into reserve at another instition and should be seen as encumbered. This is very often at a Central bank, but could also be at the overall group of savings banks, which in its turn puts it up as minimum reserve at their cental bank.
This amount is calculated by the bank itself based on their respective interpretation and choices of the accounting standard.

Column.name: OVRNGHT_DPST_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between transferable deposits and other overnight deposits.

Column.name: RVLVNG_LN_INDCTR1
Column.comment: An indicator specifying if an instrument is considered revolving or non-revolving.

Column.name: TRD_RCVBL_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between factoring and other trade receivables.

Column.name: RVLVNG_LN_INDCTR
Column.comment: An indicator specifying if an instrument is considered revolving or non-revolving.

Column.name: ADVNC_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between suspense items, transit items and other advances.

Column.name: NMNL_AMNT
Column.comment: Holding amount at nominal value

Column.name: OFF_BLNC_INSTRMNT_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between financial guarantees and other commitments (other than credit facilities).

Column.name: FNNCL_GRNT_INSTRMNT_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between financial guarantees covering debt securities and financial guarantees not covering debt securities.

Column.name: DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTY2
Column.comment: The contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.

Column.name: TYP_CMMTMNT
Column.comment: Type of commitment.

Column.name: RVCBL_INDCTR
Column.comment: Revocable indicator is an indicator specifying if the Other commitment is revocable or not

Column.name: SFT_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between repurchase agreements and security borrowing and lending transactions.

Column.name: DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTY1
Column.comment: The contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.

Column.name: SCRTY_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between different types of security borrowing and lending transactions, like security against security and security against a fee.

Column.name: RPRCHS_AGRMNT_INSTRMNT_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between term and open repurchase agreements.

Column.name: DT_STTLMNT
Column.comment: The date on which the conditions specified in the contract are or can be executed for the first time, i.e. the date on which financial instruments are initially exchanged or created.

Column.name: DT_INCPTN
Column.comment: The date on which the current contractual relationship originated, i.e. the date on which the contract agreement became binding for all parties.

Column.name: DT_LGL_FNL_MTRTY
Column.comment: The contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC3
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID3
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: FNNCL_CNTRCT_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: FNNCL_CNTRCT_ID
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each financial contract.

Column.name: OFF_BLNC_SHT_AMNT
Column.comment: Total nominal amount of off-balance sheet exposures. This includes any commitment to lend before considering conversion factors and credit risk mitigation techniques. It is the amount that best represents the institution's maximum exposure to credit risk without taking into account any protection held or other credit enhancements.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC1
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID1
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: CRDT_FCLTY_ID
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.

Column.name: ELGBL_CNTRL_BNK_FNDNG_INDCTR
Column.comment: Specifies if an object is eligible for central bank funding in the sense that it might be exchanged / provided as collateral for funding.

Column.name: BLNC_SHT_NTTNG_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
